---
title: "Biographies of Good Women, chiefly by contributors to ‘The Monthly Packet’. Second series. Edited by the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”"
---

## Biographies of Good Women, chiefly by contributors to ‘The Monthly Packet’. Second series. Edited by the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1865
**Genre:** Non-fiction: biography
**Format:** Contributions to collection, edited collection

**Publisher:** John and Charles Mozley, 6, Paternoster Row, London. Masters and Co., 78, New Bond Street, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
